test_cases.title: PluginRegistry.scan() discovers valid plugin
test_cases.description: Place a valid plugin in test dir, verify scan returns PluginDescriptor with correct fields
steps: Create test dir with package.json containing xyzAgent field

test_cases.title: PluginRegistry.scan() skips invalid manifest
test_cases.description: Plugin without xyzAgent field or incompatible manifestVersion is skipped
steps: Create test dir with package.json missing xyzAgent

test_cases.title: PluginRegistry auto-infers activationEvents from contributes
test_cases.description: Plugin with contributes.slashCommands gets onSlashCommand activation events

test_cases.title: PluginHost assigns shared Worker for trusted plugin
test_cases.description: Two trusted plugins share the same Worker Thread

test_cases.title: PluginHost assigns exclusive Worker for sandbox plugin
test_cases.description: Each sandbox plugin gets its own Worker Thread

test_cases.title: Worker crash marks handle as crashed and notifies
test_cases.description: Uncaught exception in Worker triggers crash recovery
steps: Load and activate plugin that throws uncaught error

test_cases.title: JSON-RPC request/response round-trip succeeds
test_cases.description: Plugin calls storage.set via RPC, gets success response
steps: Worker side calls rpcClient.request('plugin.storage.set', { key: 'k', value: 'v' })
Assert handler was called with correct params

test_cases.title: JSON-RPC timeout returns RPC_TIMEOUT error
test_cases.description: Request with 100ms timeout to unregistered method times out

test_cases.title: Concurrent RPC requests map responses correctly
test_cases.description: 10 concurrent requests each get their own correct response
steps: Register handler that echoes params.back with 10ms delay
Send 10 concurrent requests with unique values
Assert each response matches its request value

test_cases.title: onStartupFinished plugin auto-activates after initialize
test_cases.description: Plugin declaring onStartupFinished activates during startup

test_cases.title: onSlashCommand plugin lazy-activates on first use
test_cases.description: Plugin with onSlashCommand:hello does not load until command is triggered

test_cases.title: Deactivate disposes all subscriptions
test_cases.description: Plugin subscriptions array items are all disposed after deactivate
steps: Activate plugin that pushes 3 Disposables to context.subscriptions

test_cases.title: Storage persists across restart
test_cases.description: Value set before restart is readable after restart
steps: Create new PluginStorage instance with same dir

test_cases.title: Storage rejects writes exceeding 10MB limit
steps: Set 10MB of data across multiple keys

test_cases.title: Concurrent writes from different plugins do not interfere
test_cases.description: Two plugins writing to their own keys simultaneously both succeed
steps: Plugin A sets key-a, Plugin B sets key-b concurrently
Assert plugin A's file has key-a, plugin B's file has key-b

test_cases.title: Existing extension tests still pass
test_cases.description: All 4 existing extension test files pass without modification
